_comment: KIT = what YOU own/want. `partId` points into catalog.json. `status`: have | ordered | want | idea. A build's `target` specs (videoSystem/radioProtocol/cellCount) are what the compat script checks each part against.

builds.name: Pavo Pico — 1S Walksnail Cinewhoop
builds.summary: First build. Indoor/low-speed digital whoop on the Walksnail Avatar ecosystem, flown with the RadioMaster Pocket (ELRS).

items.note: Critical path — Pico can't fly digital without this.
Critical path — can't see without goggles.
Gap. Confirm A30 vs BT2.0 first.
Hidden gap — wasn't on the checklist.
